meaning: n.[矿物]碧玉(绿色装饰用宝石)
examples: Karen met Jasper after their graduation ceremony.
Hey, Jasper! How excellent you are! We were all touched by your speech on the graduation ceremony.
Jasper in the flesh is very hoity-toity, in a good cat way, and Abby's gorgeous.
Comedian Jasper Carrott's wife has saved their daughter's life by donating one of her kidneys.
Jasper Knabb and his streaming video technology is about to beat Steve Jobs to the punch.
